basics.name: Wei-Kun Chen
basics.summary: Assistant Professor at the School of Mathematics and Statistics, Beijing Institute of Technology. Research interests include integer programming theory, algorithms and software, and applications in supply chain management and wireless communication.

location.address: School of Mathematics and Statistics, Beijing Institute of Technology

work.name: Beijing Institute of Technology
work.position: Special Associate Research Fellow / Pre-Appointed Assistant Professor

education.institution: Academy of Mathematics and Systems Science, Chinese Academy of Sciences

publications.name: Generalized Coefficient Strengthening Cuts for Mixed Integer Programming
Optimal Network Slicing for Service-Oriented Networks with Flexible Routing and Guaranteed E2E Latency
publications.publisher: IEEE Transactions on Network and Service Management

publications.name: Quantized Constant-Envelope Waveform Design for Massive MIMO DFRC Systems
